Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: A teenage boy abuses his mom, often getting his younger brother involved. He says that he got the idea when he'd witnessed one of his mother's boyfriends pull a knife on her.
Video.title: We Beat Up Our Mom

Video.summary: Antoinette says her boyfriend is crazy because he is constantly accusing her of cheating. She says she cheated in the past, but she hasn't since.
Video.title: Lie Detector Drama

Video.summary: Angelica says John "checks her" for signs of cheating every time she comes home. She wants a lie detector test to prove she's been faithful! Then, Ashley she found out that her boyfriend, TJ, had cheated on her when she was 8 months pregnant.
Video.title: Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex

Video.summary: Jennifer claims she was sexually abused by her stepfather Allen and moved in with her best friend’s family to protect herself. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken relationship?
Video.title: You Stole 15 Years of My Life

Image.alt: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
You Stole 15 Years of My Life
You Stole 15 Years of My Life

Video.summary: TJ refuses to let Ashley see their child after a video of her blowing marijuana smoke into the baby’s face. Then, Tiffany blames Shawn for their 10 year old daughter’s smoking and wandering the streets. Can Steve intervene before it’s too late?
Video.title: Bad Mom Caught on Tape

Video.summary: Monique’s friend Winston claims that Adrian was advertising himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Who’s lying?
Video.title: Steve, I Think He's Gay

Video.summary: Jackie and her children live with a registered sex offender; accused of touching his own son, Ronnie takes a lie-detector test and demands a DNA test too.
Video.title: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Image.alt: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Video.summary: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always staying out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to stay with them just because she’s the mother of his child. Is he also cheating on her?
Video.title: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Image.alt: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Video.summary: Destiny says that her daughter has unexplained bruises after visiting Brian. She also says the child told her someone grabbed her neck and threw her against a wall. Brian denies the abuse and believes that it is either Destiny or her boyfriend.
Video.title: Did You Hurt Our Daughter?

Video.summary: As a child, this young girl was left by her mother to be raped by an older man in order for her to get drugs.
Video.title: Was I Sold For Drugs?

Video.summary: Misguided youth ... 15-year-old Gala is having some serious and dangerous issues with race and her mother Tanya believes she needs to change. Her out of control behavior has her sneaking out of the house, sleeping around with older men, and skipping school. Gala argues this is the way she was raised, but her mother blames Gala's boyfriend Patrick. With her behavior escalating, Steve's trying everything he can for one last attempt to open her mind.
Video.title: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Image.alt: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Video.summary: Jeremy hasn't seen his child in four years, but after coming clean, he wants to right the wrongs that he's done. Julie, his ex and mother of their child, doesn't buy it, claiming that he spends more time with his new girlfriends child than his own.
Video.title: Why Aren't You A Father

Video.summary: Robert says he believes that his daughters mother has been abusing her and he wants to prove the abuse and gain full custody of his daughter. Then, Casey claims her ex-boyfriend is abusive towards their kids and she wants him out of their lives.
Video.title: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Image.alt: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Video.summary: Mindy wants Michael to step up to the plate, be a father, and help support his child. His new girlfriend Tanya also wants Michael to be involved in his child's life, but after hearing the lie detector results, she too might question her man.
Video.title: I Want Him To Love Me

Image.alt: I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me

Video.summary: Amber had a miscarriage due to a STD from Mike and is pregnant again, but suspect he’s still cheating!
Video.title: Why Does Your Mom Hate Me?

Image.alt: Why Does Your Mom Hate Me?
Why Does Your Mom Hate Me?
Why Does Your Mom Hate Me?

Video.summary: Justyn says that Lisa's pregnancy was an accident after his condom broke on their second date.
Video.title: It's Not My Baby, She's Obsessed With Me

Image.alt: It's Not My Baby, She's Obsessed With Me
It's Not My Baby, She's Obsessed With Me
It's Not My Baby, She's Obsessed With Me

Video.summary: Avonte was diagnosed with cancer that had him hospitalized for almost a year.
Video.title: A Sister's Betrayal

Video.summary: Robin says her fiancé treats her like a slave: ordering her to cook, clean, and even perform sexual favors.
Video.title: You Applaud Your Mom’s Abuser?

Video.summary: Damon confesses to his girlfriend Shanice that he’s been cheating on her and has a kid with Danielle.
Video.title: My Man Has a Secret Life

Image.alt: My Man Has a Secret Life
My Man Has a Secret Life
My Man Has a Secret Life

Video.summary: Broderick refuses to watch their youngest grow up motherless, and wants Renita to wake up!
Video.title: Mom, Meet Your 8 Year Old Son

Image.alt: Mom, Meet Your 8 Year Old Son
Mom, Meet Your 8 Year Old Son
Mom, Meet Your 8 Year Old Son

Video.summary: Stephanie takes a lie-detector test to prove that she is faithful to her boyfriend.
Video.title: He Checks Me, But I Never Cheated

Image.alt: He Checks Me, But I Never Cheated
He Checks Me, But I Never Cheated
He Checks Me, But I Never Cheated

Video.summary: Jatavious is back to figure out if he fathered his girlfriend’s 2 kids!
Video.title: She Was Prostituting, Am I the Father?

Image.alt: She Was Prostituting, Am I the Father?
She Was Prostituting, Am I the Father?
She Was Prostituting, Am I the Father?

Video.summary: Taylor and Joseph admit to getting into violent arguments where he slapped, choked, scratched and even threw objects at her, but agree that if they can prove neither cheated, then their violent streak will end. But will it end?
Video.title: I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her

Image.alt: I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her
I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her
I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her

Video.summary: Curtis sat down with his mother Telisha, and told her that he is trying to have a baby but Telisha was shocked and terrified because Curtis is only 13 years old! Curtis insists he is ready to be a father.
Video.title: 13 Year Old Father?

Video.summary: After Cassarah became Tim’s live-in nanny, they began a sexual relationship. Her family is livid over the 26 year age gap and claims that he takes her to swingers’ parties. Can Steve help Cassarah leave this dysfunctional relationship?
Video.title: I Seduced My Teenage Nanny

Video.summary: Ashley’s boyfriend Tyjuan thinks his abuse is justified because he suspects her of cheating and doubts the paternity of their five kids! Then, Natasha gave birth two weeks ago, but fears that the father is her rapist and not her husband Daniel!
Video.title: 5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?

Image.alt: 5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?
5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?
5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?

Video.summary: Amanda is here because she's trying to save her marriage to Bo. Bo's not sure if he's the father of her child and needs a DNA test to prove the truth. Plus, Julie says that she believes she's being cheated on by Stevie.
Video.title: I Need Answers Now

Video.summary: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.
Video.title: Is It Love ... Or Lies?

Video.summary: Lagraciala tragically lost her 10 month old son in an accident. She is now accusing AJ of stealing his ashes!
Video.title: Steve Outraged!

Video.summary: Steve looks back on memorable stories of DNA clearing up years of doubt and mystery or devastating and confirming people's worst fears.
Video.title: DNA: Life-Changing Results

Video.summary: A look at guests who are subjected to emotional abuse that chips away at their self-worth and independence.
Video.title: Relationships Exposed

Video.summary: Adrian thinks Shantay has been lying throughout their relationship; Uniqua and her husband fear that he is not the father of her child; Chris' girlfriend wants him to know that one of their five children is not his.
Video.title: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All

Image.alt: I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
I'll Prove It's Your Child Once and for All
